title: Fulfillment Chaos Auto-Remediation
description: Automated remediation workflow triggered by Site Reliability Guardian when fulfillment Kafka consumer SLO is breached. Detects chaos mode and disables failure injection to restore service health.

trigger.eventQuery: event.type="guardian.validation.failed" AND event.provider="dynatrace.site.reliability.guardian" AND matchesPhrase(guardian.name, "Fulfillment Chaos Detection Guardian")

tasks.name: check_chaos_active
tasks.description: Check if chaos mode is currently active by querying Kubernetes for FAILURE_RATE environment variable

tasks.name: get_recent_deployment
tasks.description: Check for recent SDLC deployment event (v2.0.0-green) within last 15 minutes

tasks.name: send_alert_notification
tasks.description: Send Slack notification about SLO breach and pending auto-remediation

input.message:
🚨 *Fulfillment SLO Breach Detected*

*Service:* fulfillment
*Issue:* Kafka consumer error rate: {{ _.sloValue }}%
*Threshold:* 95%
*Root Cause:* QueryTimeoutException + KafkaException
*Action:* Auto-remediation starting...
*Expected Recovery:* 2-3 minutes

_Chaos mode detected - disabling failure injection_

tasks.name: disable_chaos_fabrik_oa
tasks.description: Remove chaos environment variables from fulfillment deployment in fabrik-oa namespace

input.command: set env deployment/fulfillment FAILURE_RATE- SLOWDOWN_RATE- SLOWDOWN_DELAY- -n fabrik-oa

tasks.name: disable_chaos_fabrik_ot
tasks.description: Remove chaos environment variables from fulfillment deployment in fabrik-ot namespace

input.command: set env deployment/fulfillment FAILURE_RATE- SLOWDOWN_RATE- SLOWDOWN_DELAY- -n fabrik-ot

tasks.name: disable_chaos_fabrik_oa_2
tasks.description: Remove chaos environment variables from fulfillment deployment in fabrik-oa-2 namespace

input.command: set env deployment/fulfillment FAILURE_RATE- SLOWDOWN_RATE- SLOWDOWN_DELAY- -n fabrik-oa-2

tasks.name: send_sdlc_rollback_event
tasks.description: Send SDLC event to mark auto-rollback in Dynatrace

tasks.name: wait_for_stabilization
tasks.description: Wait 2 minutes for pods to restart and metrics to stabilize

tasks.name: revalidate_slo
tasks.description: Re-run guardian validation to confirm SLO is back in compliance

input.message:
✅ *Auto-Remediation Complete*

*Service:* fulfillment
*New Success Rate:* {{ result('revalidate_slo').sloValue }}%
*Status:* {{ result('revalidate_slo').validationStatus }}
*Recovery Time:* ~2 minutes
*Action Taken:* Disabled chaos failure injection
*Deployment:* Rolled back to v1.0.0-blue

_System health restored. Monitoring continues._

tasks.name: send_failure_notification
tasks.description: Send failure notification if remediation did not restore SLO

input.message:
⚠️ *Auto-Remediation Incomplete*

*Service:* fulfillment
*Current Success Rate:* {{ result('revalidate_slo').sloValue }}%
*Status:* {{ result('revalidate_slo').validationStatus }}
*Issue:* SLO still breached after remediation

_Manual investigation required. This may be a real production issue, not chaos._

_implementation_notes: This is a template. Actual implementation requires:
1. Create workflow in Dynatrace UI: Workflows > Create workflow
2. Configure Kubernetes integration with service account permissions
3. Set up Slack integration and replace C01234567 with real channel ID
4. Adjust conditions and thresholds based on actual deployment patterns
5. Test with manual SLO breach before enabling auto-trigger
